title: ROPE validation check kind: lonlat_density_plot
description: Shape of a check's params block when check.kind == 'lonlat_density_plot'. Renders a lon/lat density map at each requested altitude for a representative time within the case's window. Pure visualization — produces plot image(s) only, no scalar score. `value`/`unit`/`passed` in the resulting validation-report entries are always null for this kind.
